name: context-repo
description: Access your prompts, documents, and collections from Context Repo directly in Claude, with progressive disclosure search for hierarchical document navigation
long_description:
Manage your entire prompt library, documents, and collections without leaving Claude. Search with natural language, navigate document hierarchies, and organize your AI content.

**Features:**
- Progressive disclosure search with 3-level hierarchy (document, section, paragraph)
- Hierarchical navigation in 5 directions (up, down, next, previous, surrounding)
- Session-based deduplication for iterative search refinement
- Semantic search across all content with natural language queries
- Full prompt management (create, read, update, delete)
- Document management with markdown support
- Collection organization for prompts and documents
- Secure API key authentication

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Your Context Repo API key. Get one at contextrepo.com/dashboard → Settings → API Keys

tools.name: list_prompts
tools.description: List all prompts belonging to the authenticated user. Returns prompt titles, descriptions, and metadata.

tools.name: get_prompt
tools.description: Get the full details of a specific prompt including its content and variables

tools.name: create_prompt
tools.description: Create a new prompt template

tools.name: update_prompt
tools.description: Update an existing prompt with automatic version history tracking

tools.name: delete_prompt
tools.description: Permanently delete a prompt and all its version history

tools.name: get_prompt_versions
tools.description: Get the version history of a prompt with change logs and content previews

tools.name: restore_prompt_version
tools.description: Restore a prompt to a previous version with non-destructive rollback

tools.name: list_collections
tools.description: List all collections with names, descriptions, and item counts

tools.name: get_collection
tools.description: Get collection details including its prompts and documents

tools.name: create_collection
tools.description: Create a new collection folder to organize prompts and documents

tools.name: update_collection
tools.description: Update a collection's name, description, color, or icon

tools.name: delete_collection
tools.description: Delete a collection folder without deleting the items inside it

tools.name: add_to_collection
tools.description: Add documents or prompts to a collection by their IDs

tools.name: remove_from_collection
tools.description: Remove documents or prompts from a collection without deleting them

tools.name: list_documents
tools.description: List all documents with optional collection filtering and keyword search

tools.name: get_document
tools.description: Get the full content of a specific document including text, tags, and metadata

tools.name: create_document
tools.description: Create a new text document with markdown support and automatic semantic indexing

tools.name: update_document
tools.description: Update an existing document with automatic version history and re-indexing

tools.name: delete_document
tools.description: Permanently delete a document and all its version history and search index entries

tools.name: get_document_versions
tools.description: Get the version history of a document with change logs and content previews

tools.name: restore_document_version
tools.description: Restore a document to a previous version with non-destructive rollback and re-indexing

tools.name: find_items
tools.description: Discover prompts, documents, and collections by semantic similarity or keyword match

tools.name: deep_search
tools.description: Search within document content using vector similarity and return ranked, hierarchical chunks

tools.name: deep_expand
tools.description: Navigate the document hierarchy from a chunk in 5 directions (up, down, next, previous, surrounding)

tools.name: deep_read
tools.description: Retrieve a single document chunk with full content and hierarchy metadata
